languages.text: "Ха, Погонщица мертва. Я-то думал — на ее месте будем мы. Ваша Светлость, мы вернемся в лагерь и доложим полковнику. Капитан-интендант, вы со мной".
"Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."
languages.original_text: "Ха, Погонщица мертва. Я-то думал — на ее месте будем мы. Ваша Светлость, мы вернемся в лагерь и доложим полковнику. Капитан-интендант, вы со мной".

traits.locale_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."
"Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."
"Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

languages.text: 「ハッ、ドローバーは死んだ。その代わりには我々が来ると思っていた。君たち、我々はキャンプに戻って大佐に報告する。軍需隊長、君も俺について来い」
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

traits.locale_text: 「ハッ、ドローバーは死んだ。その代わりには我々が来ると思っていた。君たち、我々はキャンプに戻って大佐に報告する。軍需隊長、君も俺について来い。」

languages.text: "Ha, Çoban öldü. Onun yerinde biz oluruz sanmıştım. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, kampa dönüp albaya rapor vereceğiz. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, benimle geliyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

traits.locale_text: "Ha, Çoban öldü. Onun yerinde biz oluruz sanmıştım. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, kampa dönüp albaya rapor vereceğiz. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, benimle geliyorsun."

languages.text: «Ja, el Pastor está muerto. Yo pensaba que caeríamos nosotros. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, volveremos al campamento para informar al coronel. Capitana intendente, conmigo».
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

traits.locale_text: «Ja, el Pastor está muerto. Yo pensaba que caeríamos nosotros. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, volveremos al campamento para informar al coronel. Capitana intendente, conmigo».

languages.text: “哈，拒生花死了，还以为这回死的是我们。大人，我们这就返回营地，向上校汇报。军需官上尉，你跟我来。”
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

traits.locale_text: “哈，拒生花死了，还以为这回死的是我们。大人，我们这就返回营地，向上校汇报。军需官上尉，你跟我来。”

languages.text: « Ha, le Chasseur est mort. J'ai bien cru que c'est nous qui allions y passer. Votre Seigneurie, nous allons retourner au camp pour faire notre rapport au colonel. Capitaine-quartier-maître, venez avec moi. »
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

traits.locale_text: « Ha, le Chasseur est mort. J'ai bien cru que c'est nous qui allions y passer. Votre Seigneurie, nous allons retourner au camp pour faire notre rapport au colonel. Capitaine-quartier-maître, venez avec moi. »

languages.text: "Ha, der Treiber ist tot. Ich dachte schon, es würde uns treffen. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wir kehren zum Lager zurück und erstatten dem Colonel Bericht.. Captain-Quartiermeisterin, ihr kommt mit mir."
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."

traits.locale_text: "Ha, der Treiber ist tot. Ich dachte schon, es würde uns treffen. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wir kehren zum Lager zurück und erstatten dem Colonel Bericht.. Captain-Quartiermeisterin, ihr kommt mit mir."
